revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-025

Alternative term: High yield steel

Steel having a higher tensile strength than mild steel, containing up to 0.3 % carbon, 0.5 % copper, and 1.5 % manganese, or other metals.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|High tensile steel}}
